section: Chapter: The Case of the Fifth Word

questions.question: Who is Encyclopedia Brown?
questions.correct_answer: A young boy detective who helps solve mysteries
questions.explanation: Encyclopedia Brown is known for his intelligence and ability to remember facts, which helps him solve difficult cases.

questions.question: What was the profession of Encyclopedia Brown’s father?
questions.explanation: Chief Brown often discussed unsolved cases with his son during dinner.

questions.question: Who was Tim Nolan?
questions.correct_answer: A man suspected of being involved in a jewellery robbery
questions.explanation: Although Nolan was suspected of robbery, the stolen jewellery was never found during his lifetime.

questions.question: Who was Daniel Davenport?
questions.correct_answer: Tim Nolan’s friend who was suspected of being his partner in the robbery
questions.explanation: Davenport disappeared after the jewellery store robbery, making him a suspicious character.

questions.question: What unusual message did Nolan leave behind?
questions.explanation: These words were part of a coded message attached to Nolan’s will.

questions.question: What did the coded words represent?
questions.explanation: The words represented Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday after removing the letters 'day'.

questions.question: What was the missing fifth word in the code?
questions.explanation: The fifth word represented Friday and pointed to a young fir tree in Nolan’s nursery.

questions.question: Where was the stolen jewellery hidden?
questions.correct_answer: Under a young fir tree in Nolan’s nursery
questions.explanation: The coded message helped Encyclopedia Brown discover the location of the hidden jewellery.

questions.question: How did Encyclopedia Brown solve the mystery?
questions.correct_answer: By recognising the coded pattern related to days of the week
questions.explanation: His logical reasoning helped him decode the message and locate the jewellery.

questions.question: What important skill helped Encyclopedia solve the case?
questions.explanation: Detective stories often highlight the importance of careful observation and logical thinking.

notes.title: Encyclopedia Brown
notes.content: Encyclopedia Brown is a young boy with exceptional intelligence who helps solve mysteries using logic and observation.

notes.title: Chief Brown
notes.content: Chief Brown is the Chief of Police and often consults his son when he encounters difficult cases.

notes.title: The Coded Message
notes.content: Nolan left a coded message using anagrams of the days of the week after removing the word 'day'.

notes.title: The Fifth Word
notes.content: The missing fifth word represented Friday and pointed to the fir tree where the jewellery was hidden.

notes.title: Mystery Resolution
notes.content: Encyclopedia Brown decoded the message and solved the mystery of the missing jewellery.

facts.fact: Encyclopedia Brown is known for remembering facts from books he reads.
Tim Nolan and Daniel Davenport were suspected of robbing a jewellery store years earlier.
The coded words represented days of the week without the letters 'day'.
Logical reasoning and pattern recognition helped solve the mystery.
